item.action: Add RFC 8785 canonical semantic digests alongside exact-byte evidence digests.

progress.finding: Canonical JSON gives semantically equivalent I-JSON values a stable representation independent of object property insertion order; it complements rather than replaces retained raw-byte digests.
progress.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

item.handoff: Evidence-envelope and attestation builders should record raw_digest and canonical_json_digest as distinct fields. Promotion logic must reject attempts to substitute canonical semantic identity for original-byte retention or claim truth.
